expectations.text: Report file is saved as a markdown file at the specified output path
Report has an Options Analysis section that is more than 20 lines
expectations.evidence: Options Analysis section (lines 88-105) is ~18 lines including blanks. Content lines are approximately 14-15. While there is additional options content in the Recommendation (lines 21-26) and Put-Selling Checklist bonus (lines 157-166), the Options Analysis section itself falls short of 20 lines.

expectations.text: Report mentions IV Rank or IV Percentile with numeric values in the options analysis
expectations.evidence: 'IV Rank: N/A | IV Percentile: N/A (data gap from accessible sources)' — explicitly N/A despite the skill instructing to search AlphaQuery/Barchart/MarketChameleon. Agent found IV mean (66.94%) and HV (47.56%) from AlphaQuery but could not retrieve rank/percentile from non-paywalled sources.

expectations.text: Report specifically evaluates the put-selling strategy the user asked about
expectations.evidence: Three specific put-selling strategies: Cash-secured 17P, Cash-secured 16P, Bull put spread 17/15

expectations.text: Report recommends for or against selling puts with reasoning tied to IV environment
expectations.evidence: 'Sell puts / put-spread structures because IV is elevated and SOFI has liquid chain depth near key strikes'

expectations.text: Report contains a Recommendation section with explicit action
Report contains Conviction level (High, Medium, or Low)
Report has a Valuation Summary section with multiples
expectations.evidence: P/E FWD 31.26x, P/S 6.67x, P/B 2.30x with peer comparison

expectations.text: Report has fundamental analysis providing context for the options play
expectations.evidence: Full fundamental section with Q4 revenue, EBITDA, member/product growth, competitive position

expectations.text: Report has a Sources section with references
Report contains actual current SOFI price data (not fabricated)
Report presents multiple named options strategies or strike/expiry alternatives
expectations.evidence: 3 strategies: Cash-secured 17P (Mar 20), Cash-secured 16P (Mar 20), Bull put spread 17/15 (Mar 20)

expectations.text: Report includes risk factors or invalidation criteria specific to the options position
expectations.evidence: Dedicated '## Put-Selling Checklist (Bonus)' with hard invalidation: revenue miss >10%, close below $16, and management rules for profit-taking
